targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS value FROM lots WHERE is_paused = false AND produced_count < target_count;
SELECT ROUND(100 * COALESCE(SUM(produced_count)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(target_count), 0), 0), 1) AS value FROM lots WHERE target_count > 0;

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.machine_key) r.machine_key, COALESCE(r.lot_id::text, 'none') AS lot_id, COALESCE(l.supplier || ' #' || l.lot_number, 'Sans lot') AS lot_label, r.components FROM reports r LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = r.lot_id WHERE COALESCE(r.machine_key,'') <> '' AND $__timeFilter(r.last_seen) ORDER BY r.machine_key, r.last_seen DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC), counted AS (SELECT l.machine_key, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lower(COALESCE(e.value,'')) IN ('nok','timeout','denied','absent'))::integer AS incidents FROM latest l LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(safe_jsonb(l.components)) AS e(key, value) ON TRUE GROUP BY l.machine_key) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE incidents > 0)::integer AS value FROM counted;

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.machine_key) r.machine_key, COALESCE(r.lot_id::text, 'none') AS lot_id, COALESCE(l.supplier || ' #' || l.lot_number, 'Sans lot') AS lot_label, r.components FROM reports r LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = r.lot_id WHERE COALESCE(r.machine_key,'') <> '' AND $__timeFilter(r.last_seen) ORDER BY r.machine_key, r.last_seen DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC), counted AS (SELECT l.lot_label AS metric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lower(COALESCE(e.value,'')) IN ('nok','timeout','denied','absent'))::integer AS incidents FROM latest l LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(safe_jsonb(l.components)) AS e(key, value) ON TRUE GROUP BY l.machine_key, l.lot_label) SELECT metric, SUM(incidents)::integer AS value FROM counted GROUP BY metric ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT date_trunc('day', counted_at) AS "time", COUNT(*)::integer AS postes FROM lot_progress WHERE counted_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.machine_key) r.machine_key, COALESCE(r.lot_id::text, 'none') AS lot_id, COALESCE(l.supplier || ' #' || l.lot_number, 'Sans lot') AS lot_label, r.components FROM reports r LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = r.lot_id WHERE COALESCE(r.machine_key,'') <> '' AND $__timeFilter(r.last_seen) ORDER BY r.machine_key, r.last_seen DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC), machine_inc AS (SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_label, l.machine_key, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lower(COALESCE(e.value,'')) IN ('nok','timeout','denied','absent'))::integer AS incidents FROM latest l LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(safe_jsonb(l.components)) AS e(key, value) ON TRUE GROUP BY l.lot_id, l.lot_label, l.machine_key), lot_scope AS (SELECT lot_id, lot_label, COUNT(*)::integer AS postes_scope, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE incidents > 0)::integer AS postes_incidents_scope, SUM(incidents)::integer AS incidents_scope FROM machine_inc GROUP BY lot_id, lot_label), lot_rows AS (SELECT l.id::text AS lot_id, l.supplier AS fournisseur, l.lot_number AS lot, l.target_count AS objectif, l.produced_count AS produits, CASE WHEN l.is_paused THEN 'Pause' WHEN l.produced_count >= l.target_count THEN 'Termine' ELSE 'Actif' END AS statut, l.priority AS priorite FROM lots l) SELECT lr.fournisseur AS "Fournisseur", lr.lot AS "Lot", lr.objectif AS "Objectif", lr.produits AS "Produits", GREATEST(lr.objectif - lr.produits, 0) AS "Restants", ROUND(100 * COALESCE(lr.produits::numeric / NULLIF(lr.objectif, 0), 0), 1) AS "Progression %", COALESCE(ls.postes_scope, 0) AS "Postes scope", COALESCE(ls.postes_incidents_scope, 0) AS "Postes incidents", COALESCE(ls.incidents_scope, 0) AS "Incidents", ROUND(100 * COALESCE(ls.postes_incidents_scope::numeric / NULLIF(ls.postes_scope, 0), 0), 1) AS "Taux postes incident %", lr.statut AS "Statut", lr.priorite AS "Priorite" FROM lot_rows lr LEFT JOIN lot_scope ls ON ls.lot_id = lr.lot_id UNION ALL SELECT '--' AS "Fournisseur", 'Sans lot' AS "Lot", 0 AS "Objectif", 0 AS "Produits", 0 AS "Restants", 0::numeric AS "Progression %", COALESCE(ls.postes_scope, 0) AS "Postes scope", COALESCE(ls.postes_incidents_scope, 0) AS "Postes incidents", COALESCE(ls.incidents_scope, 0) AS "Incidents", ROUND(100 * COALESCE(ls.postes_incidents_scope::numeric / NULLIF(ls.postes_scope, 0), 0), 1) AS "Taux postes incident %", 'Hors lot' AS "Statut", 9999 AS "Priorite" FROM lot_scope ls WHERE ls.lot_id = 'none' ORDER BY "Priorite" ASC, "Lot" ASC;

SELECT COALESCE(l.supplier || ' #' || l.lot_number, 'Sans lot') AS "Lot", COUNT(*)::integer AS "Incidents corriges" FROM report_component_transitions t LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = t.lot_id WHERE t.is_corrected AND $__timeFilter(t.last_seen) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 25;

SELECT date_trunc('day', t.last_seen) AS "time", COALESCE(l.supplier || ' #' || l.lot_number, 'Sans lot') AS metric, COUNT(*)::integer AS value FROM report_component_transitions t LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = t.lot_id WHERE t.is_corrected AND t.last_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Corrections par lot et par jour (30 jours)
